title: Audit Management System
description: AI Agent builds the audit management system in NocoBase, while AI employees analyze evidence, risks, and remediation progress.
description_cn: 围绕审计发现、证据和整改期限，由 AI Agent 搭建 NocoBase 系统，AI 员工分析风险。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build an application with NocoBase — Audit Management System: centralize audit findings, evidence materials, remediation deadlines, and risk status, with AI evidence analysis, remediation suggestions, multilingual translation, and form filling. Use this prototype as the layout and signature visual reference: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/61-audit-management-system.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 审计管理系统:集中管理审计发现、证据材料、整改期限和风险状态，支持 AI 证据分析、整改建议、多语言翻译和表单填写。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/61-audit-management-system.html
